channel_pipeline_caveat: 19-common coverage 21% -> default restrict to covered recordings (~2800 subj/~4900h), hashed; or channel-flexible (pinned)

overall: 9A corpus+code READY; awaiting PM review to approve 9B-0 smoke
grid_judgment: The 19-common corpus is subject-RICH (6535) but hours-POOR (3483h, median 0.35h/subj). Original grid {32,128,512}@H0{250,500} was TOO CONSERVATIVE at top (corpus supports N up to ~2048-6500) AND INFEASIBLE at bottom (H0=250 N=32 needs 7.8h/subj, only 5 subjects have it). Binding constraint = PER-SUBJECT HOURS not subject count. RECOMMEND P1 grid: H0~100h, N{32,128,512,2048,max~6500} (64x range, better-powered diversity slope) + growing-hours to N~6470@0.25h. To bring back for P1 approval.
